title: Structured UI critique against canonical screen[0]
description: ui-critic-agent consumes the refreshed design_package.json, design_system.json, design/stitch/ exports, and baseline notes; produces or refreshes artifacts/ui_critique.json; updates design_package.json references and status only as needed for handoff to refinement, with critique anchored to stitch.screen_ids[0] structure.
acceptance: Reads from and writes under tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/ exclusively for this feature chain.
artifacts/ui_critique.json exists per ui_critique.skill.md contract and explicitly references alignment risks versus canonical Stitch screen[0] IA and layout.
design_package.json updated: references.ui_critique set to relative path; status reflects critiquing or equivalent; blockers[] lists unresolved critique blockers if any.
No frontend product implementation; critique artifacts only.
